public.title: Refund policies

public.loadingNote: We are fetching the active policy version.

public.relatedNote: Use the links to move between the public session and package policies.

fallback.title: Session refund policy is unavailable right now

hero.title: Session Refund Policy
hero.subtitle: Review cancellation and refund rules before the session and how the cancellation outcome is calculated.

document.title: Single Session Cancellation and Refund Policy
document.subtitle: This policy applies to individual session bookings on Sawiyaa.
document.intro: This policy explains the cancellation rules, refund results, and the cases that may require manual review by the platform team.

items.0: This policy applies to individual session bookings.
items.1: It does not cover packages or subscriptions unless their own terms state otherwise.
items.2: Cancellation results are calculated from session time, payment status, and the active policy.

items.0: Refund eligibility depends on the time left before the scheduled session.
items.1: Cancellation results may vary based on payment status or whether the session has started.
items.2: The final result is shown to the user before cancellation is confirmed.

items.0: The session may be eligible for a full refund if cancellation is requested at least 48 hours before the session.
The session may be eligible for a partial refund according to the active policy.
The session may be eligible for a smaller partial refund.
Refund requests may be rejected if they are too close to the session time.
There may be no refund after the session starts or in case of a no-show unless the platform team approves an exceptional review.
The platform team may review exceptional cases such as technical issues or urgent circumstances.
items.1: Manual review does not guarantee refund approval.

items.0: The team may review a case manually when unusual circumstances are present.
items.1: Manual review helps handle cases not fully covered by the base policy.

items.0: When a session is cancelled, the platform shows the result before confirmation.
items.1: The result includes whether cancellation is available, the refund percentage, the expected amount, and the refund destination.
items.2: Cancellation is completed only after the user accepts the shown result.

notice.title: Important note
notice.body: The actual cancellation result is shown inside the cancellation confirmation window before confirmation, based on session time, payment status, and the active policy.

support.title: If you need a special review
support.body: If you believe your case needs a special review, you can contact support.
